S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

          |Real.exp (t * x)| = Real.exp (t * x) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg (Real.exp_pos (t * x)).le]
          _ ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := by
            have h₄ : t * x ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
              cases' le_or_lt 0 t with ht ht

                have h₉ : 0 ≤ |t| := abs_nonneg t

                -- Use the bounds on x to bound t * x
                have h₁₁ : x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := h₃
                have h₁₂ : t * x ≤ t * (μ + 2 * √v) := by
                  nlinarith
                have h₁₃ : t * (μ + 2 * √v) ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
                  have h₁₄ : t * (μ + 2 * √v) = t * μ + t * (2 * √v) := by ring
                  have h₁₅ : |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) = |t| * |μ| + |t| * (2 * √v) := by ring
                  have h₁₆ : t * μ ≤ |t| * |μ| := by
                    cases' le_or_lt 0 μ with hμ hμ
                    · -- Subcase: μ ≥ 0

                      have h₁₈ : |t| * |μ| = t * μ := by

                        <;> linarith

            have h₅ : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := by
              apply Real.exp_le_exp.mpr
